hero.tagline: I help brands and products tell stories that convert through strategic marketing, thoughtful UI/UX, and design systems people love to use.

services.subtitle: End-to-end product design and marketing from discovery and brand to launch and growth.

ux.title: UI / UX Design
ux.desc: Wireframes, prototypes, and pixel-polished interfaces — designed in Figma, informed by research.

logo.title: Logo Design
logo.desc: Brand marks, monograms, and full identity systems that give products a distinct, memorable voice.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Data-dense interfaces and admin panels that turn complex information into clear decisions.

mobile.title: Mobile Apps
mobile.desc: iOS and Android product design onboarding flows, motion details, and polished launch-ready UI.

kacyber_senior.title: Senior Product Marketing Officer
kacyber_senior.description: Leading marketing and product design teams, overseeing product strategy and guiding new product launches. Designing interfaces in Figma and driving brand consistency.

kacyber_officer.title: Marketing Officer
kacyber_officer.description: Planned and executed campaigns for the KaCyber Go Card and digital ticketing system. Played a key role in the 2023 launch of the KaCyber Go Card.

uzazi.title: Marketing Officer & Design Officer
uzazi.description: Lead marketing activities and visual branding. Design promotional materials and social content for our community of mothers.

musadan.title: Digital Marketing & Web Development Specialist
musadan.description: Manage Musadan's digital presence, design on-brand graphics, and maintain the public website. Contribute to light code development.

primacy.title: Graphic Designer & Content Manager
primacy.description: Designed marketing materials, managed social media content, and ensured consistent brand messaging across campaigns.

likana.title: Online Marketer
likana.description: Built digital marketing campaigns promoting tour packages and safari experiences. Ran targeted ads and analyzed performance.

sumic.title: Graphic Designer
sumic.description: Designed banners, flyers, product catalogs, and social media graphics that supported the company's marketing campaigns.

whyHireMe.body: Five years across product marketing and design I have launched flagship products, shaped brand identities, and shipped digital experiences that drive measurable growth. I move fast, design with intent, and write so users actually want to read.

ictCards.title: National ICT Innovation Hub Access Cards
ictCards.description: Designed the visitor access card system for the National ICT Innovation Hub front and back layouts, QR-based identity, and brand-aligned typography for a secure, professional credential.

wegoApp.title: New weGo App for KaCyber
wegoApp.description: Redesigned the weGo App with refreshed wallet, top-up, recharge and ticketing flows with a cleaner visual language and clearer hierarchy for conductors and operators.

testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by colleagues, partners, and managers across product, design and engineering.

hadijah.name: Kyampeire Hadijah
hadijah.quote: Shariff blends product instincts with design polish. He launched our Go Card with a clarity of message and visual system that made marketing the product feel effortless.

mariam.name: Kemigisha Mariam
mariam.quote: Reliable, creative, and incredibly organized. Whether it's a campaign, a deck, or a website, Shariff ships work that genuinely moves the needle.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Marketing, design, and a love for telling product stories.
about.bio1: I'm a Senior Product Marketing Officer with 5 years of experience across digital marketing, traditional marketing, product design, and product marketing. I help businesses develop and execute marketing strategies that drive growth, improve customer engagement, and strengthen brand presence.
about.bio2: I design and prototype products in Figma, create on-brand marketing materials, and work fluently across Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, and modern marketing tools.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to say hello? Send me a message.

contact.subject: Subject

validation.required: Please fill in your name, email and message before sending.

footer.about: Senior Product Marketing Officer and UI/UX designer crafting brands and products that people use, share, and remember.
footer.subscribeDesc: Drop your email and get occasional notes on new work.
